description: Official-looking report in Arabic script. Refers to Abū l-Mufaḍḍal Mukhtār b. Bushayr (? cf. ENA 4020.62). Mentions the governors (ʿāmilīn) of various locations. Needs examination. Reused on verso for piyyuṭ, possibly in a known hand.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
